summary: PART I . Our Company We are a global private markets investment firm focused on providing customized investment solutions and advisory and data services to our clients. Our clients include some of the worlds largest public and private defined benefit and defined contribution pension funds, sovereign wealth funds and insurance companies, as well as prominent endowments, foundations, family offices and private wealth clients, which include high-net-worth and mass affluent individuals.
